abort.unique_id_mismatch: The bot account does not match the currently configured account

data_description.api_token: The bot token from the Discord Developer Portal. See the documentation for instructions on creating a bot.

user.description: Enter your Discord bot token. You can find it in the [Discord Developer Portal]({portal_url}) under your application's Bot settings.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot add a channel while the Discord bot ({bot_name}) is not loaded.

error.cannot_access_channel: The bot does not have permission to access this channel.
error.channel_not_found: No channel or user found with that ID. If adding a server channel, make sure the bot has been invited to the server first.

data_description.channel_id: The numeric ID of the Discord channel or user to send messages to. Right-click a channel or user in Discord and choose "Copy ID" (requires Developer Mode).

user.description: Enter the ID of a Discord channel or user. Enable Developer Mode in Discord settings, then right-click the channel or user and select **Copy ID**.
user.title: Add Discord channel

channel_not_found.message: Discord channel or user with ID {channel_id} was not found.

file_not_found.message: File {path} does not exist or is not a file.

path_not_allowed.message: Path {path} is not in the Home Assistant allowlist. Add it to homeassistant.allowlist_external_dirs in configuration.yaml.

send_message.description: Send a message to a Discord channel, optionally with images or embeds.

embed.description: A Discord embed object. Supported keys: title, description, color, url, fields, footer, author, thumbnail, image.
embed.name: Embed

images.description: List of local file paths to attach as images. Paths must be in homeassistant.allowlist_external_dirs.
images.name: Images

title.description: Optional title, rendered in bold above the message.
title.name: Title

urls.description: List of URLs to download and attach as files.
urls.name: URLs

verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates when downloading from URLs.
verify_ssl.name: Verify SSL

send_message.name: Send message
